title: CrazySmoulaCraft
description: Modpack for players who enjoy the Create mod but find vanilla Minecraft boring. This modpack introduces new biomes to the Overworld, redesigns the Nether and End dimensions, and adds a new "secret" dimension. Optimization is key, with over 190 mods!
body:
There are many mods dedicated to exploration, adding new biomes, structures, and adventures. You can discover different landscapes, hidden dungeons, and unique resources that make exploring the world more fun and exciting.

One of the special features of this modpack is a **new "secret" dimension**. This hidden world is full of unique challenges, treasures, and mysteries waiting to be found. It gives players a whole new place to explore, separate from the Overworld, Nether, and End. Finding and unlocking the secrets of this hidden dimension adds a lot of excitement to the game.

Additionally, the Nether and End dimensions have been greatly improved. The Nether is no longer just a fiery wasteland but now has new biomes, creatures, and resources. You will find dangerous lava-filled landscapes and eerie fortresses, making it more interesting and challenging.

The End dimension been transformed for better experience. Besides the Ender Dragon, there are new structures, biomes, and rare materials to discover. The once barren End is now a vibrant and dangerous world, full of opportunities for those who explore it. These changes make the End not just a final destination but a place for continued adventure.

These updates make exploration a big part of the modpack, encouraging players to go on new adventures and find amazing rewards.

**Avg. 85 Fps on I5 8350U with intel uhd graphics 620, 16 gb ram (allocated 8gb)**
